title: Silk Touch Tools
description: This Pack Makes A Visual Indicator On Your Tools To See If Theres Silk Touch On It
body:
**This Texturepack Adds A Visual Indicator To Tell If Your Tools Have Silk Touch Or Not.**

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad517e9fe6b0f82def4b1571e85f738766cec17.png)

The Indicator Will Show With A Ametyst On It, That Feels Pretty Vanilla.

If You Like This **Pls Follow** The Project.
